x_query.oql:
works where title/abstract has all (
    any (near "demand forecasting", near "load forecasting"),
    any (
      near "peak and valley",
      near "rule based",
      near "rule-based",
      near "two stage",
      near "two-stage"
    )
  )
return id, display_name, year, primary location, abstract inverted index, DOI
